title: MOFCOM: Preliminary affirmative determination in anti-dumping investigation on certain analog integrated circuits originating in the United States
body: MOFCOM announced a preliminary affirmative determination in an anti-dumping investigation covering interface ICs and gate driver ICs under HS headings 8542 and 8541. Exporters should review country-specific duties when shipping to China.

title: Provincial commerce department trade remedy alert: EU carbon border adjustment may affect steel-aluminum embodied exports
body: A provincial fair-trade bureau issued an early warning on EU CBAM reporting obligations for electronics enclosures and heat sinks containing aluminum content above threshold levels.
